title: viola × angelliae
intro: Viola × angelliae, also known as the hybrid violet, is a rare and unique plant that is a cross between the common violet (Viola sororia) and the yellow violet (Viola pubescens). The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Viola × angelliae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
